commit.message:
Automation hygiene (scripts): observability + watcher/waiter fixes, dead-code removal, Rule-8 plan-gate

Six dispatch-automation script fixes (PR-A of a 2-PR split; docs follow in PR-B):

- rge-ai-review-ps1-remove: delete unused ai-review.ps1 / ai-review.sh.
  Both were superseded prototypes hard-coding the two forbidden patterns
  (claude --json-schema hang; unwrapped native calls under EAP=Stop). No
  live caller; removing ai-review.ps1 shrinks the PSScriptAnalyzer CI
  surface 31->30.

- wait-gha-sha-prefix-match: Wait-GitHubActions.ps1 now matches commit SHAs
  by prefix (new Test-ShaMatch helper) on both the gh-run-list and PR-rollup
  paths, so an abbreviated -Commit (incl. the script's own 826a9e8 example)
  no longer false-times-out with exit 2. New ISSUE-260 regression coverage.

- watch-dispatch-stages-fourth-success-terminal: Watch-DispatchStages.ps1
  adds a 4th success terminal (ai-dispatch-done AND NOT ai-dispatch-failed),
  reusing the same label poll, so no-commit / published / PR-mode runs stop
  falsely escalating to HANG SUSPECTED. Failed check stays first.

- dispatch-health-trends-staleness:
  * Get-AiDispatchHealth.ps1 emits a loud stale-readout banner when the
    newest retained run is >24h old AND git shows a later merged
    ai-dispatch ISSUE than the newest retained run (failure-tolerant git
    read; never crashes, never changes exit code), plus a cwd-default guard
    so a -File invocation with empty PSScriptRoot no longer crashes
    Join-Path. New -MainRef param (default main).
  * Get-AiDispatchTrends.ps1 adds -AlertRecencyHours (default 24) gating
    duration ALERTS to recent samples so one stale sample cannot fire a live
    alert; reporting stats unchanged.

- rge-dispatch-runevidence-copyout: Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1 adds
  Copy-DispatchRunDirToPrimary and calls it before every git worktree remove
  (4 destroy-sites), mirroring the gitignored worktree run dir out to the
  primary .ai/ so Get-AiDispatchHealth.ps1 stops going blind after a
  successful run removes the worktree. The two worktree move archive-sites
  intentionally have no copy-out. Best-effort: a copy failure warns and
  never changes the dispatch exit code. New ISSUE-259 coverage.

- PLANGATE-RULE8 (script half): Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1 plan-gate prompt
  now applies Protocol Rule 8 (negative current-state claims require a
  falsifying search) as a verdict criterion, returning needs_changes at
  round 0 instead of deferring to post-execution Codex control.

Validation (no Rust changed; GitHub CI covers it): parser smoke 0 errors;
tools/dispatch-tests Pester 308/308 pass; PSScriptAnalyzer 0 findings over
30 tracked files; Health cwd-guard + stale banner spot-checked against live
.ai data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
